== Notes for [[Item:Q89270|Q89270]] ==

Princess of the Roman Empire in the 5th century of the Christian Era, wife of the Roman politician Anicius Probus Probus, with whom she left descendants.

REFERENCE_NUMBERS:
66F2DEBA896241EFBBE49822EF79916CC9BA
geni:6000000010505110431

[[Category:GEDCOM Notes Pages]][[Category:Pages]]
